calendar.matters:
Notice Of Request For Entry Of Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-05-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Lynn O'Malley-Taylor, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Daniel T. LeBel, Esq., appearing for Cross-Complainant, Pong Kim,
Order Granting Waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted Cross-defendant RIVERWALK HOLDINGS, LTD.,
Default of Cross-Defendant has been duly entered.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Cross-Complainant and against Defaulted Cross-Defendant as follows:

Damages: $93,500.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $
Attorney's Fees: $32,400.00
Costs: $545.60
Total Judgment in the amount of $126,445.60

Judgment signed in open court.

Notice Of Request For Entry Of Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-14-2016 Continued To Jan-05-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

ATTY. ROBERT STEMPLER, TEL. NO. 1-805-246-2300 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.
